name: Robert's Housewarming Party | Dispatch
description:
"It's a housewarming gift for your housewarming party, Robert."

Robert had recently learned that his Mecha Man suit wouldn't work without the Astral Pulse. So he was drinking away his sorrows with a bottle of whiskey. That is why Invisigal had set up a surprise house party at Robert's apartment to boost his spirits.

The characters that are at the party are: Robert Robertman / Mecha Man, Blonde Blazer, Invisigal, Sonar, Punch Up, Malevola, Coupé, Flambae, Prisim, Golem, Chase / Track Star, Phenomaman, Roy / Royd, and Waterboy.
creator: TalkEase
